biography:
Bodybuilder turned animal advocate 💪
🐶 Raising funds for shelters
🐾 Sharing adorable animals

items.caption_text:
💔🐾 The Hunt may have started with ONE dog… but it became about so much more. 🐾💔

Every shelter we entered…
Every rescue we visited…
Every forgotten face sitting behind a kennel door waiting to finally be chosen. 🐶

The long-term dogs.
The seniors.
The overlooked ones who have spent months, years, sometimes even over a decade waiting for a second chance.

Those are the faces we can’t stop thinking about. ❤️

Mama’s story matters.
But so do ALL the others still waiting tonight.

That’s why Jordan’s Way keeps showing up — bringing awareness, fundraising, supplies, beds, toys, food, medical support, and hope to shelters & rescues across the country. 🐾

And we’re just getting started.

If you want to help us give back even MORE…
If you want to be part of something bigger…
🐾 Become a Jordan’s Way Patreon today.
Link in bio.

We walk while they wait. ❤️ #jordansway #forgottendogs #whiletheywait #shelterdogs #animalrescue

items.caption_text:
🚨 FINAL DAY. THIS IS IT. 🚨

30 days of searching.
Hundreds of tips followed.
Shelter after shelter…

All for ONE dog who has spent FIFTEEN YEARS waiting to be seen. 💔🐾

Right now, everything is moving fast—
Leads are coming in.
Phones won’t stop ringing.
Messages are flooding our inbox.

And for the first time… it truly feels like we’re close. 👀🔥

But we’re not there yet.

We need YOU in this final moment.

Did you catch something in the clues?
Have you seen a dog that matches the story?
Could your tip be the one that finally brings this dog home?

This is your moment to step in and make a difference.

Because this mission was never just about one dog…
It’s about every overlooked, forgotten soul still waiting in a kennel, hoping today is their day.

Let’s bring this home—together. 🐶💙

👇 JOIN THE HUNT
https://www.jordanswaytour.com/dog-the-bounty-hunter

#JoinTheHunt #FinalDay #JordansWay #AnimalRescue #ShelterDogs

items.caption_text:
🚨 I’ve got a lead… 🚨

After weeks of chasin’ clues, tips, and movin’ across the country… me and Kris think we might know where this dog is.

But I ain’t callin’ it yet… could be the break, could be another dead end.

Time’s runnin’ out — and I need the Dog Pound more than ever.

🧩 Work the clues
📢 Share what you’re seein’
🐾 Be part of this

This ain’t just one dog… it’s every one still waitin’ for a second chance.

👉 https://www.jordanswaytour.com/dog-the-bounty-hunter

Let’s finish this. 🐾🔥

items.caption_text:
🚨 ONE DAY LEFT. 🚨

One more day to find the dog who’s been waiting in a shelter for FIFTEEN YEARS. 💔🐾

This Hunt… it changed us.

Every clue.
Every shelter.
Every dog Kris has walked past along the way…

It’s a reminder that there are THOUSANDS still waiting.
The seniors. The overlooked. The ones in the back… hoping today is finally their day. 🥺

We are closer than we’ve ever been.
But we’re not done yet.

We need YOU. 🔥

Don’t just watch this—be part of it.

🧩 Join the Hunt
📍 Help solve the clues
❤️ Help us finish what we started

Because tomorrow… someone’s life is about to change forever.

Make sure you can say you were part of it. 🐶💙

👇 JOIN THE HUNT
https://www.jordanswaytour.com/dog-the-bounty-hunter

#JoinTheHunt #JordansWay #ShelterDogs #RescueDogs #AdoptDontShop

items.caption_text:
🚨 Only 2 days left 🚨

We’re down to the final stretch… and I need ONE answer — what city is this dog in?

Me and Kris have chased everything… clues, tips, shelters… and we’re still missin’ that last piece.

Dog Pound — this is your moment.

👇 Drop the city
📢 Push this out
🧩 Help crack it

You solve it — there’s a cash prize.

But the real win?
That dog finally goes HOME after 15 YEARS.

👉 https://www.jordanswaytour.com/dog-the-bounty-hunter

Let’s finish this. 🐾🔥

items.caption_text:
💔🐾 This Hunt was NEVER just about one dog.

Yes… we’re searching for the dog that’s been waiting in a shelter for 15 YEARS.
And we are NOT giving up. 🔥

But every shelter we search… every kennel we walk past… every forgotten face we meet reminds us why Jordan’s Way exists.

The seniors overlooked for years.
The shy dogs in the back.
The ones still waiting for someone to finally choose them. 🐶

THIS is the mission. 💙

To bring more awareness.
More support.
More supplies.
More hope.
More second chances.

Join the Hunt & be part of something BIGGER than yourself. Help us continue showing up for shelters & rescues across the country. 🐾🔥

Join the mission (link in Bio)
#jointhehunt #jordansway #forgottendogs #weshowup #savethemall

items.caption_text:
🚨 Clock’s tickin’… 3 days left 🚨

Me and Kris are still on the road, chasin’ every lead we can.

But right now… I need help.

We’re close… real close… but we’re still missin’ that last piece.

Dog Pound — this is where we all step in.

There’s a dog been waitin’ 15 YEARS… let’s bring him home.

This ain’t just a hunt… it’s for every dog still sittin’ there waitin’.

Push this out. Let’s finish it. 🐾🔥

items.caption_text:
This is WHY we won’t stop. 💔🐾

4 days left to find the dog that’s been waiting in a shelter for 15 YEARS… and we are SO close, but still so far away.

Every shelter Kris walks into…
Every dog still waiting…
Every face in the back kennel…

That’s what this mission is REALLY about. 🐶

Yes, we’re searching for ONE dog.
But this Hunt represents THOUSANDS of forgotten shelter & rescue animals across the country still waiting for someone to choose them.

And we NEED YOUR HELP. 🔥

Join the Hunt.
Solve the clues.
Be part of something BIGGER than yourself.

🐾 Help us bring awareness to shelter animals everywhere

items.caption_text:
POV: you ask to meet the dog who’s been at Cove Animal Rescue the longest…

Meet Beauty 🐾

She’s been waiting 7 years…

7 years without a home.
7 years watching others get chosen.
7 years still waiting for her turn 🥹💔

Year after year… still here.
Still hoping.

She deserves more than a kennel.
She deserves a couch, a home, a forever.

Please don’t let her wait any longer.

Like, share, and help Beauty finally find her family 🏡✨

Beauty does need multiple visits & time to warm up to new people. Until then she will continue to live her best life at Cove Rescue, being out all day, going to the beach every week, constant walks & hanging out with her dog friends & volunteers at the rescue!

#longisland #animalrescue #share #help #cattledog

items.caption_text:
This is WHY we’re doing this. 💔🐾

Every shelter.
Every rescue.
Every forgotten face Kris meets on the road.

The shy ones in the back.
The seniors nobody asks about.
The long-term dogs still waiting for someone to finally choose them. 🐶

We may be searching for ONE dog that’s been waiting 15 years… but this mission has always been about ALL of them.

Every search reminds us just how many animals are STILL waiting for their second chance.

That’s why we won’t stop.
That’s why we keep showing up.
And that’s why we NEED YOU. 🔥

🐾 Join The Hunt
🐾 Help us find this dog
🐾 Help us bring awareness to the animals still waiting
🐾 Help us continue supporting shelters & rescues nationwide

Be part of something BIGGER ❤️#JoinTheHunt #jordansway #savethemall #ForgottenDogs #nationalscavengerhunt

items.caption_text:
Paws & Perspectives — Episode 1: Kairo 🐶

Meet Kairo 🐾

Kairo has been waiting at Babylon Animal Shelter for 4.5 years…
He’s now 7 years old — goofy, loving, and still holding onto hope💛

Hear what his volunteers have to say about him.

His person is out there… they just haven’t seen him yet.

Please help us share Kairo so the right family finally finds him 🏡✨

📞 For more information, call adoption staff: 631-643-9270
📲 Like, share & help Kairo get seen
#longisland #animalshelter #adopt #share #help

items.caption_text:
🚨 WE’RE STILL SEARCHING… 🚨🐾

Another shelter searched.
Another dog still waiting. 💔

Kris says he still sees Jordan’s face in so many of these dogs… and some of them stop him in his tracks. 🐶💙

We are running out of time to find the dog that’s been in a shelter for 15 YEARS… but we are NOT giving up.

Because this was never just about ONE dog…
It’s about ALL of them waiting for someone to finally choose them. 🥺🐾

🧩 Join the Hunt
📩 Send your leads
🐶 Help us solve the clues
💙 Be part of something BIGGER

You could be the reason this dog finally goes home.

 JOIN THE HUNT 

#JordansWay #JoinTheHunt #DogTheBountyHunter #longtermshelterdog #rescuemission

Thought we had it… we didn’t. Another lead, another miss.

Time’s runnin’ out… and that dog’s STILL sittin’ there after 15 YEARS.

I’m comin’ up empty — so now I need the Dog Pound.

🐾 More eyes

items.caption_text:
One week ago today, we got to host @jordanswaytour at the lovely @nolabrewing. We had a ton of fun and made the rescue some money! It was refreshing to do a fundraiser with emphasis on the “FUN” and to see so many people (the Jordan’s Way Crew, Nola Brewing, RRR volunteers and donors) come together to help for a project that often feels hopeless and lonely. 
  #rrrrescue #adoptdontshop #helpushelpthem

items.caption_text:
🚨 Dead end… and April knows it 🚨

We went straight to her — every lead? Nowhere. Every guess? Shot down.

She built this to be hard… and yeah, it is.

But it ain’t over.

We’re still in it. We can still crack it.

I just need more people thinkin’… diggin’… pushin’.

Dog Pound — step up.

New clues droppin’ daily. Window’s still open.
That dog’s STILL waitin’ after 15 YEARS.

You crack it — there’s a cash prize… and we get that dog HOME.

👉 https://www.jordanswaytour.com/dog-the-bounty-hunter

Let’s finish this.

items.caption_text:
🚨 FINAL COUNTDOWN — 10 DAYS 🚨

Clock’s tickin’. 10 days… ONE dog… 15 YEARS waitin’.

April’s pushin’ hard… clues are tougher… pressure’s on.

I’m not walkin’ away from this.

Dog Pound — I need EVERY one of you.

🧩 Drop your leads

items.caption_text:
🚨 TIME IS RUNNING OUT 🚨

Every shelter we check brings hope… and heartbreak.
But we KNOW this dog is out there. 15 years waiting… we’ve come too far to stop now.

This is more than a search—this is a promise.
We don’t leave them behind. Ever.

But we need more eyes. More voices. More PEOPLE who care 👇

🧩 Follow the clues
📍 Send any leads
📩 Be part of something bigger

One share could be the one that changes everything.
https://www.jordanswaytour.com/dog-the-bounty-hunter

🔗 Join the hunt (link in bio)
👇 Drop your leads below

@duanedogchapman #jordansway #jointhehunt #TogetherWeCan #CommunityStrong #RescueMission

items.caption_text:
🚨 We go LIVE at 10am!
Today we’re doing ridiculous things (possibly regrettable things 😂) to raise money for the dogs at Rescue Garage. Tune in, donate, and help decide how much chaos unfolds.
🎥 https://www.facebook.com/share/18bh2jCKCB/?mibextid=wwXIfr
🐾 Every dollar helps save lives!

#rescuegarageFL #volunteersmakeadifference #jordansway
